objective: Iterate the v4 quality-gate approach once more with only slightly looser post-entry filters to try lifting coverage from 2 to >=3 eligible tickers without collapsing quality.

candidate_matrix.gate_summary: Relax body and close strength slightly while keeping a meaningful range floor.
Allow a softer candle body but keep a small distance above EMA20 to avoid weak closes.
Push for one more eligible ticker by relaxing body/range modestly without dropping the bullish-candle anchor.

execution_notes: Tetap gunakan fast anchor EMA20 + bullish candle.
Jangan kembali ke entry relaxation only.
Bandingkan terhadap baseline reference dan baseline_v3_ema20_trend_guard.
